channel.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j May 21st, 2018
item.description:
Basics

  • Official documentation
  • Cypher Refcard

    • Related project

  • Bolt Protocol - The Bolt network protocol is a highly efficient, lightweight client-server protocol designed for database applications.

    • REST API

    Python

  • neomodelstars642 - An Object Graph Mapper (OGM) for the neo4j graph database, built on the awesome py2neo.

    • Cloud

  • GrapheneDB - The world's first fully managed

    • Packages

  • Yum Repo

    • Visualization

  • Linkurious - Linkurious helps search and visualize your graph data through a simple web-based interface.
  • yFiles for HTML - yFiles is a commercial generic graph visualization programming library that comes with a demo to visualize your neo4j databases in JavaScript. It's also the basis for the free neo4j Graph Explorer app.

    • Learn

  • Getting Started with Neo4j

    • Import

  • neoloadcsvskelgenstars1 - Will output a skeleton of LOAD CSV Cypher code, from very little input (filename, separator, hints). Save time, avoid typos.

    • Tools

  • yFiles neo4j Graph Explorer - A simple, free online tool to visualize your graph data and database schema.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Mar 10th, 2017
item.description:
Development

  • Liquigraphstars115 - Database migrations management tool, based on how Liquibase works.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Dec 12th, 2016
item.description:
Related project

  • openCypher - openCypher is an open source project to bring a new public implementation of the industry’s most widely adopted graph query language: Cypher.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Oct 19th, 2016
item.description:
Editors

  • jetbrains-plugin-graph-database-supportstars175 - Graph Databases support for Jetbrains family IDE's.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Oct 17th, 2016
item.description:
Basics

  • Developer resources

    • Learn

  • Neo4j in Production

    • Certification

  • Neo4j Certification - Become a Neo4j-Certified Professional.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Hardware Sizing Calculator

    • Bolt

  • neo4j-elixir-driverstars27 - Elixir driver for the neo4j bolt protocol
  • neo4j-elixir-wrapperstars210 - Neo4j driver for Elixir, wrapped around the Bolt protocol. Fork of the Boltex.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Jun 9th, 2016
item.description:
Bolt

  • neo4j-spark-connectorstars250 - Neo4j-Spark-Connector based on Neo4j 3.0's Bolt protocol

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j May 25th, 2016
item.description:
Bolt

  • neo4j-java-driverstars249 - Java driver for Neo4j binary protocol.
  • neo4j-python-driverstars619 - Python driver for Neo4j binary protocol.
  • neo4j-javascript-driverstars696 - JavaScript driver for Neo4j binary protocol.
  • neo4j-dotnet-driverstars151 - .Net driver for Neo4j (Bolt).
  • neo4j-bolt-phpstars43 - PHP driver for Neo4j binary protocol.

    • REST API

    PHP

  • Neo4j-PHP-OGMstars152 - Doctrine style Object Graph Mapper for Neo4j

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Apr 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Full-text search

  • GraphAware Neo4j Elasticsearch Integrationstars247 - GraphAware Framework Module for Integrating Neo4j with Elasticsearch.
  • GraphAware Graph-Aided Searchstars154 - Elasticsearch plugin offering Neo4j integration for Personalized Search.

    • Extensions

  • GraphAware Neo4j Expirestars30 - GraphAware Expire is a simple library that automatically deletes nodes and relationships from the database when they've reached their expiration date or time-to-live (TTL).

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Apr 19th, 2016
item.description:
Stored Procedures

  • Apoc : Awesome Procedures on Cypherstars1.3k - Collection of useful procedures for Neo4j 3.x
  • Graphgenstars8 - Neo4j procedure for generating test data easily with Cypher

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Feb 29th, 2016
item.description:
REST API

PHP

  • neo4j-php-client - PHP Client for Neo4j leveraging the Http and Bolt protocols.

    • Basics

  • Neo4j Examples - Examples for Neo4j and Library Usage.

    • Import

  • GraphAware Neo4j Importerstars19 - Java importer skeleton for complicated, business-logic-heavy high-performance Neo4j imports directly from SQL databases, CSV files, etc.
  • neo4j-csv-firehosestars11 - Enables Neo4j’s LOAD CSV Cypher command to load from other datasources as well.
  • neo4j-rdbms-importstars37 - An automatic importer for relational databases into Neo4j.
  • Doc manager for Neo4jstars91 - The Neo4j Doc Manager takes MongoDB documents and makes it easy to query them for relationships by making them available in a Neo4j graph structure, following the format specified by Mongo Connector.

    • Benchmarking

  • neoprofilerstars31 - Neo4J database profiling utility.

    • Extensions

  • GraphAware Neo4j UUIDstars102 - GraphAware Runtime Module that assigns a UUID to all nodes in the graph transparently.
  • GraphAware Neo4j ChangeFeedstars16 - A GraphAware Framework Runtime Module allowing users to find out what were the latest changes performed on the graph.
  • GraphAware Neo4j TimeTreestars201 - Java and REST APIs for working with time-representing tree in Neo4j.
  • GraphAware Neo4j Recommendation Enginestars364 - Neo4j-based recommendation engine module with real-time and pre-computed recommendations.
  • GraphAware Neo4j Algorithmsstars34 - Custom graph algorithms for Neo4j with own Java and REST APIs.
  • GraphAware Neo4j Warmupstars10 - Simple library that warms up Neo4j caches with a single REST call.
  • GraphAware Neo4j RestTeststars13 - GraphAware RestTest is a simple library for testing code that talks to Neo4j running in standalone server mode.
  • Spatialstars704 - Neo4j Spatial is a library of utilities for Neo4j that faciliates the enabling of spatial operations on data.
  • Graphifystars378 - Graphify is a Neo4j unmanaged extension used for document and text classification using graph-based hierarchical pattern recognition.
  • neo4j-tx-participationstars3 - This is a Neo4j Server Extension to make Neo4j REST-API participate in transactions started by the transactional Cypher endpoint.

    • Development

  • Maven repositories - Neo4j Maven repositories (releases, snapshots).
  • GraphAware Neo4j Frameworkstars248- GraphAware Framework speeds up development with Neo4j by providing a platform for building useful generic as well as domain-specific functionality, analytical capabilities, (iterative) graph algorithms, etc.
  • cypher-dslstars122 - A Java DSL for the Cypher Query Language and an optional Query DSL mode.
  • Reco4PHPstars123 - Neo4j based Recommendation Engine Framework for PHP.

    • Editors

  • cypher-vim-syntaxstars35 - Very basic Vim syntax for Cypher.

    • Shell

  • cyclistars268 - A Command Line Interface for Cypher.
  • neo4j-shell-toolsstars279 - A bunch of import/export tools for the neo4j-shell.

    • Visualization

  • Gephistars4.3k - Gephi is an award-winning open-source platform for visualizing and manipulating large graphs.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Feb 17th, 2016
item.description:
REST API

PHP

  • Spiderstars24 - A simple, flexible, and beautiful graph-data abstraction for php.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Feb 1st, 2016
item.description:
Bolt

  • libneo4j-clientstars123 - libneo4j-client is a client library written in C for Neo4j. It is not intended as a complete driver, but rather as a foundation on which basic tools and drivers for various languages may be built. libneo4j-client takes care of all the detail of establishing a session with a Neo4j server, sending statements for evaluation, and retrieving results.

    • Docker

  • docker-neo4jstars217 - Docker Images for the Neo4j Graph Database.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Dec 7th, 2015
item.description:
Tools

  • ineostars74- A simple but useful Neo4j instance manager.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Nov 16th, 2015
item.description:
Full-text search

  • neo4j-elasticsearchstars184 - Neo4j ElasticSearch Integration.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Oct 31st, 2015
item.description:
Basics

  • Gists - With Neo4j GraphGists you can describe and model your domain in a simple text file and render it as a rich, interactive page in any browser. Perfect to document a specific domain, use-case, question or graph problem.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Oct 19th, 2015
item.description:
Tools

  • store-utilsstars91 - Utilities to compact, copy, fix, analyse Neo4j stores.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Oct 8th, 2015
item.description:
REST API

Other

  • AnormCypherstars125 - Scala library based on Anorm in the Play Framework.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Oct 1st, 2015
item.description:
REST API

Java

  • neo4j-ogmstars264 - Object-Graph Mapping Library for Neo4j.
  • spring-data-neo4jstars674 - Provides support to increase developer productivity in Java when using the neo4j graph database.
  • neo4j-jdbcstars99 - Neo4j JDBC driver.
  • jcypherstars82 - Java access to Neo4J graph databases at multiple levels of abstraction.

    • REST API

    Ruby

  • neo4jrbstars1.3k - An active model wrapper for the Neo4j Graph Database for Ruby.
  • neographystars607 - A thin Ruby wrapper to the Neo4j Rest API.

    • REST API

    PHP

  • neo4jphpstars541 - PHP wrapper of the Neo4j REST interface.
  • NeoEloquentstars532 - A Neo4j ORM - Based on Eloquent.

    • REST API

    Other

  • node-neo4jstars937 - REST API client for Node.
  • Neo4jClientstars358 - .NET client binding.
  • neoismstars376 - Client for Golang.
  • neoconsstars199 - A feature rich idiomatic Clojure client for the REST API.
  • RNeo4jstars236 - Driver for R.

    • Docker

  • docker-neo4j-clusterstars42 - Up & Running Neo4j cluster in no time.

    • Development

  • structrstars600 - Graph Application Platform based on Neo4j.

    • Tools

  • Graphgen - Graph Generation engine based on the Cypher DSL.

    • Learn

  • Neo4j Koansstars320 - A koan-style tutorial in Java for Neo4j.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Sep 28th, 2015
item.description:
Packages

  • Debian Packages

    • Development

  • blueprintsstars1.3k - Blueprints is a collection of interfaces, implementations, ouplementations, and test suites for the property graph data model. Blueprints is analogous to the JDBC, but for graph databases.

item.title: neueda/awesome-neo4j Sep 25th, 2015
item.description:
Visualization

  • neoclipsestars207 - Neoclipse is a tool to view, edit and explore Neo4j databases.

    • REST API

    Python

  • py2neostars61 - Py2neo is a comprehensive toolkit for working with Neo4j from within Python applications or from the command line.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Neo4j's Idea board
